title: ophiala zeylanica
intro: Ophiala zeylanica, also known as the "Raven's Wing" or "Ceylonese Ophiala", is a tropical plant native to Sri Lanka, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of Ophiala zeylanica have been used in Ayurvedic medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The plant is said to provide several health benefits, including relief from fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as potential antidiabetic and antioxidant effects. Ophiala zeylanica can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
